benefits.description: lifting of veil of depression, mental energy restoration after two months of severe mental energy depression
legit mental energy improvement, coming out of depressed energy state

protocol_notes: Part of a mitochondrial fission/fusion cycle protocol based on Longecity forum. Recently weaned off Seroquel, currently on Remeron. Protocol aimed at addressing mitochondrial DNA dysfunction and ROS output. Started cycle yesterday (as of post date). Also using CreGAAtine supplement alongside peptides.
